node.content-desc: Apple 2025 MacBook Pro Laptop with M5 chip with 10‑core CPU and 10‑core GPU: Built for Apple Intelligence, 14.2-inch Liquid R

node.text: Apple 2025 MacBook Pro Laptop with M5 chip with 10‑core CPU and 10‑core GPU: Built for Apple Intelligence, 14.2-inch Liquid R
Need help in finding the right laptop?

The 14-inch MacBook Pro with M4 Pro and M4 Max chips gives you outrageous performance in a powerhouse laptop built for Apple Intelligence. With up to 22 hours of battery life and a breathtaking Liquid Retina XDR display with up to 1600 nits peak brightness, it’s pro in every way.

SUPERCHARGED BY M4 PRO OR M4 MAX — The 14-inch MacBook Pro with the M4 Pro or M4 Max chip gives you outrageous performance in a powerhouse laptop built for Apple Intelligence.* With all-day battery life and a breathtaking Liquid Retina XDR display with up to 1600 nits peak brightness, it’s pro in every way.*
CHAMPION CHIPS — The M4 Pro chip blazes through demanding tasks like compiling millions of lines of code. M4 Max can handle the most challenging workflows, like rendering intricate 3D content.

BUILT FOR APPLE INTELLIGENCE—Apple Intelligence is the personal intelligence system that helps you write, express yourself, and get things done effortlessly. With groundbreaking privacy protections, it gives you peace of mind that no one else can access your data—not even Apple.*
ALL-DAY BATTERY LIFE — MacBook Pro delivers the same exceptional performance whether it’s running on battery or plugged in.
APPS FLY WITH APPLE SILICON — All your favorites, including Microsoft 365 and Adobe Creative Cloud, run lightning fast in macOS.*
Manufacturer’s warranty can be requested from customer service.
to make a request to customer service.

node.text: Apple 2025 MacBook Pro Laptop with M5 chip with 10‑core CPU and 10‑core GPU: Built for Apple Intelligence, 14.2-inch Liquid Retina XDR Display, 16GB Unified Memory, 512GB SSD Storage; Space Black
100K+ customers rate items from this brand highly
100K+ orders for this brand in past 3 months
Customers usually keep items from this brand

node.content-desc: Customer reviews 4.8 out of 5 stars 753 global ratings

node.text: Customers find this MacBook Pro to be a high-quality device that operates better than expected and delivers mind-bending performance, with one customer noting incredibly fast code compilation and execution times. The laptop features an outstanding display that makes everything from work documents to movies look incredible, and customers appreciate its amazing battery life and quick charging capabilities. They consider it worth the premium price and find it easy to use, with one mentioning it handles demanding workflows like video editing with ease. The connectivity receives mixed feedback - while it works seamlessly with other Apple products, some customers struggle with transferring pictures.
AI Generated from the text of customer reviews
Positive aspect, value for money, 21 mentions
Positive aspect, ease of use, 16 mentions

Top reviews from the United States
Power house def more then I needed
Reviewed in the United States on August 20, 2025
Style: Apple M4 Pro chipCapacity: 24GB Unified Memory, 512GB SSD StorageColor: Space BlackSet: Without AppleCare+

This MacBook Pro is a powerhouse. The 2024 model is incredibly fast, with apps opening instantly and multitasking handled with ease. The display is stunning — bright, sharp, and with amazing color accuracy that makes everything from work documents to movies look incredible....
Longest lasting battery I’ve ever seen in a laptop
Reviewed in the United States on January 6, 2025
Style: Apple M4 Pro chipCapacity: 24GB Unified Memory, 512GB SSD StorageColor: Space BlackSet: Without AppleCare+

Very fast laptop, very long battery life. For the graphically interesting games natively compatible with it, very good graphics performance. The display is amazing and is capable of twice as many pixels as it shows you. It was a good value in a Black Friday sale (~$1400),...
Reviewed in the United States on December 6, 2025
Style: Apple M4 Pro chipCapacity: 24GB Unified Memory, 512GB SSD StorageColor: Space BlackSet: Without AppleCare+

Over the past several months, I’ve been using this MacBook for my online coursework, and it has exceeded my expectations. Since most of my work involves word processing, online tests, and discussion posts, the computer’s performance has been more than enough. It runs fast,...

node.content-desc: Report review by Matthew R. Fleming

node.text: Reviewed in the United States on January 7, 2026
Style: Apple M4 Pro chipCapacity: 24GB Unified Memory, 512GB SSD StorageColor: Space BlackSet: Without AppleCare+

I’ve had this laptop since July and I can without a doubt say it’s the best laptop I have ever owned. My last Mac was from 2016 and lasted me till 2024. I would’ve never gotten this one if the battery didn’t give out on me. This laptop never overheats or gets super hot in...
The best laptop out there right now.
Reviewed in the United States on December 21, 2025
Style: Apple M4 Pro chipCapacity: 24GB Unified Memory, 512GB SSD StorageColor: Space BlackSet: Without AppleCare+

The best laptop for anyone. Works amazing and looks even better. While it is a little heavy to carry around for a while, it does its job and more. I have no issues with it and I'm so glad I decided to buy this MacBook. I am an engineering student and it's beyond...
Unleashing Power and Precision: The 2024 MacBook Pro with M4 Pro Chip
Reviewed in the United States on March 31, 2025
Style: Apple M4 Pro chipCapacity: 24GB Unified Memory, 1TB SSD StorageColor: Space BlackSet: Without AppleCare+

The Apple 2024 MacBook Pro with M4 Pro chip is a powerhouse laptop that combines cutting-edge performance with sleek design. Featuring a 14-core CPU, 20-core GPU, and 24GB of unified memory, it handles demanding workflows like video editing, 3D rendering, and coding with...

node.content-desc: Report review by Andrew Dr. Tiedeman

node.text: Reviewed in the United States on January 12, 2026
Style: Apple M4 Pro chipCapacity: 24GB Unified Memory, 512GB SSD StorageColor: Space BlackSet: Without AppleCare+
Reviewed in the United States on February 15, 2026
Style: Apple M4 Pro chipCapacity: 24GB Unified Memory, 512GB SSD StorageColor: Space BlackSet: Without AppleCare+
I love the MacBook Pro. I was a PC guy forever but this computer is incredible.
Style: Apple M4 Pro chipCapacity: 24GB Unified Memory, 512GB SSD StorageColor: Space BlackSet: Without AppleCare+

Excellent experience, supplier replied messages quickly and professionally. The laptop is amazing, sealed original brand new... It is a US laptop edition with English keyboard but easily to print Arabic letters, frankly speaking price difference wrt authorized reseller...
Style: Apple M4 Pro chipCapacity: 24GB Unified Memory, 512GB SSD StorageColor: Space BlackSet: Without AppleCare+
Absolutely the best laptop I've ever owned. Super fast, and with all the bells and whistles. Love it.

node.content-desc: Report review by John W. Boer

node.text: Style: Apple M4 Pro chipCapacity: 24GB Unified Memory, 512GB SSD StorageColor: SilverSet: Without AppleCare+
it’s my dream laptop! and it’s so beautiful 😍
Original state with unopened or damaged box
Style: Apple M4 Pro chipCapacity: 24GB Unified Memory, 512GB SSD StorageColor: Space BlackSet: Without AppleCare+
Premium quality. As received from manufacturer. Not opened with original state.
Style: Apple M4 Pro chipCapacity: 24GB Unified Memory, 512GB SSD StorageColor: Space BlackSet: Without AppleCare+

Good value for price. You get a laptop that can handle anything from large databases to 3d models as well as great build quality. The best part is the battery life and the fact it makes 0 fan noise. Additionally there is no performance drop when unplugged. No other laptop...
How customer reviews and ratings work
Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.
